title: Open Armor
description: Cropped armor to show more of your player skin.
body:
![A Minecraft player poses on the ground with a cropped Netherite armor set.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c04f1566841744f687eb593c5211cfeee9530f2f.jpeg)
## About
This resource pack modifies armor textures to show more of the player's skin. This covers all vanilla armor sets. Armor trims are cut as well to fit the new style, but are otherwise not further modified. Helmets are changed to look like crowns to show a bit more of the head as well.

## Features
- Crop-top styled chestplates for all armor sets
- Helmets that are crown shaped
- Modified armor trims to fit the new armor style
